info.title: n8n Binance API
info.description: API for fetching cryptocurrency prices from Binance with Pydantic type validation, technical indicators, and ML model training

get.description: Get historical price data from Binance API

schema.description: Skip close_time validation (close at end of interval)

schema.title: Skip Price Validation

parameters.description: Skip price validation (prices within high/low bounds)

post.description:
Place an order on Binance.
Supports simple orders and bracket orders (Limit/Market + SL/TP).

get.description:
Get comprehensive RSI, MACD, SMA, and EMA analysis for a trading pair.

- **symbol**: Trading pair symbol (required) - e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT
- **interval**: Candle interval (required)
- **rsi_period**: RSI calculation period (default: 14, range: 2-100)
- **macd_fast**: MACD fast EMA period (default: 12, range: 2-50)
- **macd_slow**: MACD slow EMA period (default: 26, range: 31-100)
- **macd_signal**: MACD signal line period (default: 9, range: 2-50)
- **limit**: Number of candles to analyze (default: 100, range: 30-1000)
- **SMA intervals**: 15m=[10,20,50], 1h/4h=[20,50,200]
- **EMA intervals**: 1m=[9,21], 15m=[12,26], 1h=[20,50], 4h=[50,200]

Get Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator values.

- **symbol**: Trading pair symbol (required) - e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT
- **interval**: Candle interval (required)
- **limit**: Number of candles to analyze (default: 100, range: 30-1000)
- **SMA intervals**: 15m=[10,20,50], 1h/4h=[20,50,200]

Get Exponential Moving Average (EMA) indicator values.

- **symbol**: Trading pair symbol (required) - e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT
- **interval**: Candle interval (required)
- **limit**: Number of candles to analyze (default: 100, range: 30-1000)
- **EMA intervals**: 1m=[9,21], 15m=[12,26], 1h=[20,50], 4h=[50,200]

Get a single technical indicator calculation.

- **indicator_name**: Indicator to calculate ("rsi", "macd", "sma", "ema")
- **symbol**: Trading pair symbol (required)
- **interval**: Candle interval (required)
- **period**: Calculation period (optional, defaults to standard values)
- **limit**: Number of candles to analyze

post.description:
Analyze kline data received from n8n Binance node.
Performs RSI and MACD analysis based on provided parameters.

post.description:
Generate trading signals using a trained model.

Loads the trained model for the specified symbol and interval,
fetches recent market data from Binance, and generates a prediction.
